case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. JAVIER JOEL CISNEROS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB SERVED SEP-14-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CISNEROS, JAVIER JOEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CISNEROS, JAVIER JOEL $15,370.45 PRINCIPAL, $437.84 INTEREST, $434.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,242.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $434.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CISNEROS, JAVIER JOEL
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT CISNEROS, JAVIER JOEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-22-2013
